name: Write DLFS File
description: Write text content to a file in a DLFS drive. Creates the file if it does not exist; overwrites if it does. Parent directories must already exist — use dlfs:mkdir first if needed.
creator: Covia

content.description: Text content to write (use this OR asset, not both)

asset.description: Asset reference to write as file content (e.g. '/a/0x1234...', DID URL). Streams binary directly — no size limit.

created.description: True if file was newly created
